1. Open the sealed sticker
2. Take tissue as required
3. Close the sealed sticker properly after use

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.SAP Product Name: WALCH MINI ANTI BACTERIAL WET WIPES 6SX7S 42S

product.name: Walch Mini Anti Bacterial Wet Wipes

offers.description: Buy 1 Walch Mini Anti Bacterial Wet Wipes @ $6.50

product.description: FairPrice Anti-bacterial wet wipes kills 99.9% bacteria effectively. It is enriched with aloe vera, vitamin E and chamomile extracts that keep skin moisturised and soft. Its formulation is free from alcohol, paraben, MIT and CIT. It is also pH balanced and dermatologically tested.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Phenoxyethanol, Propylene Glycol, Glycerin, Benzalkonium Chloride, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Fragrance, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, 1,2-Hexanediol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate and Sodium Benzoate.
metaData.Key Information:
• Alcohol & Paraben Free
• Dermatologically Tested
• Gentle On Skin With Aloe Vera & Vitamin E
metaData.Preparation:
Directions for use:
Peel open sticker and gently pull out the wipe. Reseal sticker after each use to retain the moisture.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct heat and sunlight.

Dettol Anti-bacterial Wet Wipes remove 99.9% of germs anytime, anywhere, from wiping your hands on the go, before and after eating, outdoor activities, before and after using the toilet to offices and schools and in the car while travelling. The soft, textured fabric gently cleanses your skin without irritation.
• Hygienic Protection for Skin and Surfaces
• The soft, textured fabric gently cleanses your skin without irritation
• Re-sealable Wipes, Multi-Purpose Wipes, Anti-bacterial wipes
